## Docs updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds locally (`./gradlew :jar:shadowJar`)
- [ ] Detekt passes
- [ ] One logical change per commit, with clear messages
- [ ] Upstream Apache-2.0 file headers left intact on derived files
